app.name: TSANet Connect
app.short_description: Multi-vendor support collaboration directly in your Zendesk tickets.
app.long_description: The TSANet Connect app embeds multi-vendor support collaboration directly into the Zendesk ticket sidebar. Agents can create, manage, and respond to TSANet Collaboration Requests without leaving Zendesk.
app.installation_instructions: Enter your TSANet API credentials and the custom ticket Field IDs for the five TSANet fields. Use BETA for testing and PRODUCTION when going live. Contact membership@tsanet.org for credentials.

empty_state: No active collaborations on this ticket.
info_banner_msg: The partner has requested more information before accepting.
error_credentials_missing: TSANet credentials are missing. Please configure the app settings (Admin Center → Apps → TSANet Connect → Settings).
confirm_close: Close this collaboration request? This action cannot be undone.
prompt_case_number: Your internal case number for this collaboration (optional):
prompt_info_needed: What additional information do you need?
